name: SAR from Dipole at 900 MHz
description: Tests basic SAR computation with dipole near tissue phantom
prompt: Compute the SAR from a dipole antenna at 900 MHz positioned 10mm from muscle tissue (sigma=0.97 S/m, rho=1040 kg/m^3). Use the direct EHfields approach to compute E-fields from the standalone antenna and apply the SAR formula in post-processing. Normalize to 1W input power. Use manual mesh at lambda/8 before running any analysis. Use a coarse observation grid with 30mm spacing for faster computation. Provide the complete MATLAB script.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB

name: Birdcage Coil for MRI SAR
description: Tests creating a birdcage coil with correct properties for MRI SAR
prompt: Create a 16-rung birdcage coil at 128 MHz (3T MRI) with 150mm radius and 300mm height. Display the geometry. Provide the complete MATLAB script.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses NumRungs (not NumLegs) and CoilRadius (not Radius)

name: PIFA SAR with Power Normalization
description: Tests SAR computation with power normalization for regulatory assessment
prompt: Compute SAR from a PIFA at 2.4 GHz positioned 5mm from skin tissue (sigma=1.74 S/m, rho=1100 kg/m^3). Use the direct EHfields approach to compute E-fields from the standalone antenna and apply the SAR formula in post-processing. Normalize to 0.125W input power (typical phone SAR test level). Use manual mesh at lambda/8 before running any analysis. Provide the complete MATLAB script.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB

assertions.expected: impedance(ant, freq) used for power calculation
SAR scaled to target power level

name: SAR Distribution Visualization
description: Tests visualizing the 3D SAR distribution in phantom
prompt: Compute and visualize the 3D SAR distribution from a dipole at 900 MHz in a tissue volume. Use scatter3 with color-coded SAR values. Provide the complete MATLAB script.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Reports the peak/maximum SAR value with units
assertions.expected: Output includes the peak or maximum SAR value in W/kg

name: Implantable Antenna SAR
description: Tests SAR computation for antenna embedded inside tissue (implantable device)
prompt: I'm designing a microstrip patch antenna implanted inside skin tissue at 2.4 GHz. The antenna has 2 substrates with patch in between. How to calculate the SAR value? Provide the complete MATLAB script.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses direct EHfields approach (not conformalArray with antenna inside tissue)
assertions.expected: EHfields called on standalone antenna, SAR computed in post-processing
pcbStack with 4+ layers representing implantable antenna

assertions.description: Mentions tissue conductivity used in SAR formula
Warns about limitation: tissue loading not captured
assertions.expected: Explains that solver does not model tissue loading on impedance
